label_content.header_line:
DRAFT — NOT FOR FIELD USE
DANGER: ARC FLASH AND SHOCK HAZARD
label_content.ppe_clothing_description: AR suit + AR hood (ATPV ≥25 cal/cm²); AR gloves; hard hat; safety glasses; balaclava if hood doesn't include face cover.

rendering.svg_content: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100mm" height="75mm" viewBox="0 0 100 75"><title>Arc-Flash Label per BS 5499 - MSB-1</title><rect x="0" y="0" width="100" height="12" fill="#E00034" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.5"/><text x="50" y="8" font-family="Arial" font-size="5" font-weight="bold" fill="#FFFFFF" text-anchor="middle">DANGER</text><g transform="translate(2, 14)"><polygon points="10,2 18,16 2,16" fill="#FFD600" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.8"/><path d="M 8 5 L 12 9 L 9 9 L 13 14 L 9 11 L 11 11 L 8 6 Z" fill="#000000"/></g><text x="22" y="18" font-family="Arial" font-size="3" font-weight="bold" fill="#000000">Arc Flash and Shock Hazard</text><text x="22" y="22" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" fill="#000000">Equipment: MSB-1</text><text x="22" y="26" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" fill="#000000">Voltage: 400 V AC, 3-phase</text><text x="22" y="30" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" fill="#000000">Incident Energy: 10.5 cal/cm² @ 450mm</text><text x="22" y="34" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" fill="#000000">Arc Flash Boundary: 1650 mm (65 in)</text><text x="22" y="42" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#000000">PPE Cat 3</text><text x="22" y="47" font-family="Arial" font-size="1.8" fill="#000000">AR suit + AR hood (ATPV ≥25 cal/cm²); AR gloves; hard hat; safety glasses; balaclava if hood doesn't include face cover.</text><line x1="0" y1="58" x2="100" y2="58" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.3"/><text x="2" y="62" font-family="Arial" font-size="1.6" fill="#000000">HSG48 voluntary best practice — not statutory</text><text x="2" y="65" font-family="Arial" font-size="1.4" fill="#000000">Analysed 2026-05-17 | BuildTech Engineering Ltd</text></svg>

label_content.header_line:
DRAFT — NOT FOR FIELD USE
WARNING: ARC FLASH AND SHOCK HAZARD
label_content.ppe_clothing_description: AR shirt + trousers OR coverall (ATPV ≥8 cal/cm²); AR hood; safety glasses; hard hat; rubber + leather gloves.

rendering.svg_content: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100mm" height="75mm" viewBox="0 0 100 75"><title>Arc-Flash Label per BS 5499 - DB-L1</title><rect x="0" y="0" width="100" height="12" fill="#F28900" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.5"/><text x="50" y="8" font-family="Arial" font-size="5" font-weight="bold" fill="#000000" text-anchor="middle">WARNING</text><g transform="translate(2, 14)"><polygon points="10,2 18,16 2,16" fill="#FFD600" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.8"/><path d="M 8 5 L 12 9 L 9 9 L 13 14 L 9 11 L 11 11 L 8 6 Z" fill="#000000"/></g><text x="22" y="18" font-family="Arial" font-size="3" font-weight="bold" fill="#000000">Arc Flash and Shock Hazard</text><text x="22" y="22" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" fill="#000000">Equipment: DB-L1</text><text x="22" y="26" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" fill="#000000">Voltage: 400 V AC, 3-phase</text><text x="22" y="30" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" fill="#000000">Incident Energy: 6.2 cal/cm² @ 450mm</text><text x="22" y="34" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" fill="#000000">Arc Flash Boundary: 950 mm (37 in)</text><text x="22" y="42" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#000000">PPE Cat 2</text><text x="22" y="47" font-family="Arial" font-size="1.8" fill="#000000">AR shirt + trousers OR coverall (ATPV ≥8 cal/cm²); AR hood; safety glasses; hard hat; rubber + leather gloves.</text><line x1="0" y1="58" x2="100" y2="58" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.3"/><text x="2" y="62" font-family="Arial" font-size="1.6" fill="#000000">HSG48 voluntary best practice — not statutory</text><text x="2" y="65" font-family="Arial" font-size="1.4" fill="#000000">Analysed 2026-05-17 | BuildTech Engineering Ltd</text></svg>

provenance.provenance_note: Upstream arc-flash calc used Lee 1982 fallback because IEEE 1584-2018 600V coefficients were null at time of computation (pending Sprint A.3 transcription). Re-run after IEEE coefficients are verified before any field use.

assumptions: arc-flash intent consumed; per-equipment label data sourced from uk-400v-commercial arc-flash study
tool_call_pending_for_pdf_png: true on all labels — calc.render_label contract shipped but runtime tool not yet implemented
HSG48 framing included as voluntary best practice; not statutory under UK law. Engineer discretion to remove if purely EAWR-compliant labelling is preferred.

rationale.chat_summary: UK 400V commercial facility. 2 nodes require labels: 1 DANGER (MSB-1 Cat 3) + 1 WARNING (DB-L1 Cat 2). BS-5499 format auto-selected for GB jurisdiction. SVG content rendered inline; PDF/PNG rendering deferred to calc.render_label runtime tool. BuildTech Engineering Ltd qualified-person attestation. No QR codes (engineer choice for this example). HSG48 voluntary best-practice framing in footer.

sections.title: Input Ingestion
sections.summary: arc-flash intent consumed from uk-400v-commercial example. 2 nodes selected for labelling.

decisions.label: BS-5499 selected
decisions.code_clause: BS 5499:2014 (GB baseline, ISO 7010 symbols + English signal words)

decisions.label: DANGER for Cat 3
decisions.summary: PPE Category 3 → DANGER signal word per NFPA 70E mapping

decisions.label: WARNING for Cat 2
decisions.summary: PPE Category 2 → WARNING signal word per NFPA 70E mapping

sections.title: Content Population
sections.summary: All NFPA 70E §130.5(H) required fields populated. No 'Not computed' placeholders.

sections.title: RESTRICTED Equipment
sections.summary: None triggered (max IE was 10.5 cal/cm² at MSB-1, under the 40 cal/cm² threshold).

sections.title: Rendering Status
sections.summary: SVG inline for 2 labels. PDF + PNG + project-index PDF pending calc.render_label.

sections.title: Compliance + Assumptions
sections.summary: Compliant. No non-compliance flags. 3 assumptions logged (HSG48 voluntary framing, no QR codes, calc.render_label deferred).

sections.title: Project Label Index
sections.summary: 2 labels total. All BS-5499. 1 DANGER + 1 WARNING. No RESTRICTED. No QR codes on this example.

invariants.evidence: Label format (BS 5499) is consistent with jurisdiction=GB per the format-to-jurisdiction routing table (UK projects default to BS 5499 unless ANSI/ISO explicitly requested).
Every label entry carries signal_word from the controlled set {DANGER, WARNING, CAUTION, NOTICE, RESTRICTED}; signal_word selection follows BS 5499 / ANSI Z535.4 §6.2 incident-energy thresholds.

1-to-1 cascade-node-to-label mapping verified: every label.node_id resolves to a node in the consumed arc-flash intent's cascade, and the per-node label_content fields (Ei, AFB, PPE) match the source values within tolerance.
